title: Xtra Nutty Brazilian Pineapple Skewers
description: A nutty and springy Brazilian dish featuring pineapple chunks, perfect for meal prep and shojin-friendly diets. This recipe combines the sweetness of pineapple with the crunch of nuts.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the maple syrup, lime juice, and olive oil.
Add the pineapple chunks, peanuts, almonds, and coconut flakes to the bowl and toss to combine.
Thread the pineapple and nut mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and broil for 5 minutes.
Flip the skewers and broil for an additional 5 minutes, or until the pineapple is caramelized.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with salt.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with additional coconut flakes if desired.
